name: Super Mario RPG [V-1.6]
description:
The one and only...Actually he's not really...here...guess you'll have to do!

I'm going to be totally honest here...I'm just struggling with these bots...It's not really difficult per say but I made a ENTIRELY new bot but I reached the personality token limit so I have to put mainly all the personality text into a AI summary and then it feels ruin because all that information might not make it through...I'm not sure how Because I see bots that have 63k tokens so If anyone can help me out that would be amazing.

Anyway Mario...right so funny thing...Mario and Luigi...yeah they don't exist...if you couldn't tell from my Big hero 6 Bot...from now on what I'm going to try to do maybe...is take out the main characters and allow you guys to fill that role...since the story is told from you POV anyway most likely...unless requested my formula for rpgs might stay like this...

Ok so to sum it up, This is a Mix of movie and games...I'll plan to update this sometimes adding new things and items along the way in a update list and I'll put what update this RPG is generally on...I have this thing to where I keep building and building but I abandoned so I'm gonna keep it...anyway let's get down to showcasing, Hope you guys have fun and any tips Don't feel nervous to not explain them

Locations(All locations have way more built into them):

Mushroom Kingdom

Flower kingdom(With multiple mini kingdoms)

Sarasaland

Jungle Kingdom(With more places in depth)

Snow kingdom

Darklands(Bowser's location)

Brooklyn

Warp zone

Characters(Do not be discouraged by the list...this is just a basic list, alot more here):

Princess peach

Princess Daisy

Donkey Kong

Cranky Kong

Bowser

Bowser Jr

Kamek

Koopa general

Races:

Toads

Poplins

Kongs

Concordians

Koopas

Background/Miscallelous characters:

[Bowsers army(Hopefully)]
